title: Binary Adder-Subtractor Unit
description: A diagram showing the components and data flow of a circuit that can perform both binary addition and subtraction using a controlled XOR gate and a full adder.
relationships: Mode Control determines XOR gate operation (B or NOT B)
XOR output and A are inputs to the Full Adder
Mode Control is fed to C_in for 2's complement subtraction
Full Adder computes Sum/Difference based on inputs
C_out and MSB detect overflow condition
